name: CronoGol v1.12.3 — Fast Penalty Restore
base: CronoGol v1.12.2 — Stats UI Final Polish
changes: Restored fast mode penalties for every number ending in 9.
Restored fast mode goals for numbers ending in 0 except 50 and 60.
Kept 50 yellow card, 60 red card, 96-97 dangerous free kick, 01-02 post, 03-04 crossbar.
Updated rules text in game modal and static help pages.
